mapper.update: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS project ( id BIGINT GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, external_project_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, name TEXT NOT NULL, status INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, bank_account_refs TEXT[], created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), claim_count BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 )
ALTER TABLE project ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS status INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS claim_count BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS project_participant ( id BIGINT GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, project_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES project(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, participant_type TEXT NOT NULL, wallet TEXT NOT NULL, legal_name TEXT NOT NULL, address_line1 TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', address_line2 TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', bic TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', lei TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', external_ref TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now() )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS project_approver ( id BIGINT GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, project_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES project(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, approver_type TEXT NOT NULL, wallet TEXT NOT NULL, user_hash BYTEA NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', first_name TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', last_name TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', user_profile_name TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', role_name TEXT NOT NULL, external_ref TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now() )

ALTER TABLE project_approver ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS email TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS first_name TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS last_name TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS user_profile_name TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT ''
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project ( id, external_project_id, name, status, bank_account_refs, created_at, updated_at, claim_count ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{externalProjectId}, #{name}, #{status}, #{bankAccountRefs,jdbcType=ARRAY,typeHandler=com.demo.server.epmigration.project.persistence.StringListTypeHandler}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{claimCount} ) ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET external_project_id = EXCLUDED.external_project_id, name = EXCLUDED.name, status = EXCLUDED.status, bank_account_refs = EXCLUDED.bank_account_refs, created_at = EXCLUDED.created_at, updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at, claim_count = EXCLUDED.claim_count

INSERT INTO project_participant ( project_id, participant_type, wallet, legal_name, address_line1, address_line2, bic, lei, external_ref, created_at ) VALUES ( #{projectId}, #{participantType}, #{wallet}, #{legalName}, #{addressLine1}, #{addressLine2}, #{bic}, #{lei}, #{externalRef}, #{createdAt} )

INSERT INTO project_approver ( project_id, approver_type, wallet, user_hash, email, first_name, last_name, user_profile_name, role_name, external_ref, created_at ) VALUES ( #{projectId}, #{approverType}, #{wallet}, #{userHash}, #{email}, #{firstName}, #{lastName}, #{userProfileName}, #{roleName}, #{externalRef}, #{createdAt} )
